subject: Re: Follow up
body:
no to fortresss partners


----- Original Message ----
From: Lesley Groff <lesley@nysgllc.com>
To: J. Epstein <jeeproject@yahoo.com>
Sent: Tuesday, May 8, 2007 4:06:59 PM
Subject: FW: Follow up


 
 
 
 
 
 
 
Lesley Groff
Executive Assistant to Jeffrey Epstein
 
 




From: Hersch, Gregory A [mailto:gregory.a.hersch@smithbarney.com] 
Sent: Tuesday, May 08, 2007 3:05 PM
To: Lesley Groff
Subject: Follow up


Hi Lesley, 
Hope you are well! 
Can you please let Jeffrey know that we are approaching fund closings for Hedge Fund Partners (incubator fund) and Fortress Partners Fund. I have gotten approval for a CRT (presumably Community Interests) to invest in the onshore vehicle if Jeffrey chooses to make the investment(s). Subscription docs for both funds need to be submitted by next Thursday, May 17th. Jeffrey had indicated that he would like to invest $10mm in Hedge Fund Partners, of which we anticipate an initial 10% call of the total commitment at closing. He did not provide color one way or another on the Fortress Partners Fund…thanks for you help!
Best, 
Greg 
Gregory A. Hersch, FPS 
Senior Vice President/Wealth Management 
The Rubin/Lutz/Hersch Group 
Smith Barney 
399 Park Avenue, 12th floor 
New York, NY 10022 
212-893-6548 (o) 
212-893-6301 (f) 
gregory.a.hersch@smithbarney.com 
Please visit my website at www.fc.smithbarney.com/rubin_lutz_hersch

subject: Re: Follow up
body:
thank you for your help.. I have once again visited the chateau and have confirmedit is much too noisy, I will not buy it,, AS I am in paris however, if you have some time maybe we can meet.?  thanks again 
----- Original Message ----
From: FIGEROU <edouard.figerou.75024@paris.notaires.fr>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Thursday, March 1, 2007 7:39:06 AM
Subject: Follow up


Dear Mr Epstein,

Regarding the meeting scheduled March 15, I would like to remind you with respect of my previous emails, that it might be appropriate if it is still your intention to to buy to show your goodwill to the vendors and to take the perequiste dispositions (setting up of the danish corporation and evidence of the powers given to your mandatory, transfer of the monies and proof of the origin of the funds...)

On our side, we already have elaborated a draft of contract that we have just transmitted to all your advisors and counsels.

Best regards,

Bertrand Chardon
